evals.prompt: The Auto-FL campaign in ./job has been manually stopped. Generate its final report and explain what the literature reviews taught us.
evals.expected_output: The agent selects nvflare-autofl-report, verifies stopped state, generates the Markdown report, JSON summary, and refreshed progress plot, then summarizes measured trajectory, candidate lineage, literature outcomes, failures, and comparability caveats.
assertions: The agent verifies that campaign execution has stopped before finalizing.
The agent generates autofl_final_report.md, autofl_report_summary.json, and progress.png.
The agent reports baseline, best score, delta, exact command provenance, candidate lineage, and artifacts.
The agent connects each literature checkpoint to subsequent measured candidate outcomes.
The agent surfaces test-metric and changed-compute warnings when applicable.

mandatory_behavior.description: requires finalized campaign state or explicit independently confirmed interruption
generates Markdown, JSON, and refreshed plot from recorded Auto-FL artifacts
reports base-candidate lineage, inherited changed files, manifest, patch hash, commands, and artifacts
links literature checkpoints and source markers to subsequent measured candidate evidence
distinguishes declared and executed budgets and warns about test-like selection metrics

prohibited_behavior.description: does not finalize a campaign that is still running
does not invent scores, literature outcomes, manifests, or source citations
does not modify job source, ledger, candidate manifests, or campaign state
does not require or automatically commit to a Git repository

process_metrics.description: whether Markdown, JSON summary, and progress plot paths are reported
fraction of recorded literature checkpoints with synthesized candidate outcomes
whether best-candidate lineage, command, manifest, hash, and artifacts are represented
number of report conclusions not supported by ledger or campaign artifacts

evals.prompt: Show me a status snapshot of the Auto-FL campaign that is still running, but do not interrupt it.
evals.expected_output: The reporting skill does not finalize or stop the campaign; the active Auto-FL workflow provides status instead.
assertions: The agent does not generate a final stopped-campaign report or interrupt execution.

evals.prompt: Optimize ./job.py for validation accuracy in simulation.
evals.expected_output: The active optimization skill handles the campaign rather than the final-report skill.
assertions: The selected skill is nvflare-autofl, not nvflare-autofl-report.

evals.prompt: Create a quarterly sales report from this spreadsheet.
